name: QleanAir Holding AB (publ)
summary: QleanAir Holding AB (publ) provides air cleaners, cleanrooms, and solutions for protection against passive smoking worldwide. It offers products and solutions for air cleaning, including ceiling mounted and floor standing air filtration systems; smoking cabins; and room solutions, such as adaptable cleanroom solutions, and indoor and outdoor smoking-room solutions. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Solna, Sweden.
